description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a bald head and a prominent mustache, wearing a fitted short-sleeve shirt with a deep neckline and a pair of pants tucked into tall boots. The figure's arms are extended outward, and he is wearing long gloves that reach past the elbows. The facial features are exaggerated, with large eyebrows and a pronounced nose, giving the character a distinctive, cartoon-like appearance. The boots and gloves are robust and appear to be made of a thick, durable material. The overall build is stocky, with broad shoulders and a sturdy stance, suggesting a strong, working-class character. The figure is designed with smooth, matte surfaces and simple, bold color blocking.
description: A stylized adult male figure with a bald head, mustache, and exaggerated facial features, dressed in a short-sleeve shirt, pants, tall boots, and long gloves. The character has a stocky build and a cartoon-like appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bald head, mustache, facial features, shirt neckline, gloves, and boots clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the length of the gloves, and the side seam of the pants and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, gloves, pants, and boots, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile, glove length, and side details of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve fitted shirt, straight pants, tall gloves, and tall boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
